title: Bayer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Bayer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Bayer India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Bayer India:
Bayer India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
